TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ==== O pinangan no kodasing. ==== O pinangan no kodasing i, matiya o kalitang ko pi 'alaw ami ngengeng, o malengaway i sota' matiya o kalorengos ko pi'alaw, nikaolira adihay ko heci nira mikihatiya to lamit i laloma' no sela/sota', matiya o kalitang a satosatosa sa amalacecay, ira ko toloay sepatiy amalacecay, ano fangcal kokalengawan nila a sera i, adihayay koka ciheci nira, o heci nira i manga'ayay a malo kakangenen, manga'ayay a sasimaleng ato kalomaamaan, sanaw maolahay ko tamdaw ami papaloma to kodasing, o kaolahan no kodasing a malengaw i, itiraay i safa^ded sanay ato so'metay a finacadan a sela. O sowal no pasowalay i, ano'ayaw to 1530 a mihecaan misalingato a mapacomod tani i Taywan nano o Potawya a tamdaw misalingato a patayni i Into ato Awmen , dodo sato i o Sipanya a tamdawan ko patayniay i Filiping , tiya mapacomod tayni i no holamma a niyalo' tiya a talacowaco:wa a malopisak, nikaolira tono Oco a niyalo' i, si^enaway sanaw caay kafangcal a mangengaw ko kodasing i tira, tono Amilika satohaw i, itini i 1800 amihecaan o kodasing i o nano sapaka^en to fafoy ato 'ayam, dodo sato yamanikaw ko tamdaw to kaka^en i, halo tamdaw sato ami salingato a koma^en, sanaw saadihay sato ami sakakahad ami paloma to kodasing. Tonomita sato o Taywan aca o Pangcah/'Amis i, caay kafokil to kodasing hananay, nanomamang tangasa i to'as ko pipapaloma to kodasing, nga'ayay a kaladatengen, nga'ayay a sapacamol i hemay to tolo no kaen, i 'orip no mita caay to pakalasawad to kodasing a koma^en, lomasato ano irako lafang no loma' i, aca ano mipalafang sato a taracoacoa i, manga'ayay a sali^pah a koma^en ko kodasing, ngalefeng to konoaniniay a tamdaw, o kodasing i o sasangaen to simal ato kasi ato kalomaamaan a kakaeneng. Masamaanay ko rengaw no kodasing. Mipaloma sato kodasing i, yananoheci nira mahelek ami siwka pawalien to ami 'icang, likol sato mi'osaw to todongay to sapaloma, tiya mipohci to podac nira, ma^deng to ami sa'osi to sapaloma i, misongila' to omah topi palomaan, tiya misatositosil topi palomaan, hatosatosa haan ami lafong i sota' cecay lipa' tosa a heci no kodasing, ola a kodasing i maolahay to so^metay a lomi'ad ama lengaw, awaay ko pipili' topi palomaan, ano masamaanay to a sela ato sota, nga'ayay to ami paloma, o lengaw nira a takalaw i caay pakatafesiw to tosol no woo', misalingato a malengaw masadak nani sota' a lomahad, tangasa ikato'asan nira i, caay ka halafin mato'asay to, alatek tolo folad ma^deng to misalingato aci hana aci heci, sanaw cecay miheca i ma^den natosa ami siwka, sanaw adihay koma olahay a palomaay to kodasing, opipalomaan to kodasing i, itira i saka cecay tangasa i sakatolo a folad, ato i saka ^enem tangasa i siwa a folad, tonia mahelek ami paloma i malawod ko 40 alomi'ad misalingato to aci hana, mahelek to koka cihana nira i, maceker to kaya hana nira a pasayla i sota', tiya amisalingato tangasa i 45~60 alomi'ad, ano matatodong ko cepa' no sela i, fangcal koka ciheci nira, dodo sato malawod ko tosa a folad, misatapang to totayal ami satapang mifi^enot to kodasing. Ano caay patatodong to lomi'ad ami siwka i, ano malatar mili'ayaw kopi siwka i, caay ka^deng ko 'ikis caay kafangcal, ano maosoy talalikol kopi siwka i, caay to kafangcal a fi^enoten, hatilaay ko misakodasingay. Samaneng a misaadihay a paloma to kodasing Sa'ayaw hawi cecay miheca nacecay amipaloma nacecay ami kodasing, ano mo^ep pawti ko kodasing i mi'osaw to cecay powti to todongay o sapaloma, ano hakowa ko kakahad no omah i, hatilaay ko pipatatodong ami paloma to kodasing, o kakahad no omah kopi 'alawan to pipatatodong ami paloma to hakowaay ko kaadihay nomi palomaan, likorsato ira ko tasa miheca natolo ami kodasing, lomasa cecay miheca natosa ami kodasing, aca natolo ami kodasing, itiraay ko saka adihay no kodasing, iraay kono kacihelangan a kodasing, iraay kono kasi^enawan a kodasing, lomasato i iraay ko kakakotaykotay to panay aca o koga ato kalomaamaan ama cacaliw ami paloma to kodasing, ano itini i macacamolay to tafok a sata' a paloma i tadafongcalay, nawhani i la^enoay no sota' ko heci no kodasing, ano misiwka sato i fangcalay a fi'enoten, maolahay ko kodasing to hatilaay a sera ato sota' ano ga'ay i itini i so^metay a lomi'ad, matatodong ko cepa' no sera o tadafangcalay ko lengaw ato kaciheci no kosasing, lomasato nawhani maolah ko kalofawo ato topi/'ayam ami kali'ang to rengaw no kodasing, sanaw lalideng ami liso' ami simaw tiya caay ka kali'ang ko rengaw nora kodasing, itilaay sanaw matini ko saka adihay no pisiwka to kosasing. O saka tadamaan no kodasing. O kodasing hananay i, caay ka ^edengay a kalo kaka^enen aca, manga'ayay a sasimalen to simal no sapi tangtang to kalodateng ato kalomama:an, o sadak no simal nira tangasa i 45%-50% koka adihay, mikikaka to kalitang 14%-16%, itini i polong no kakokoka to misanga'an to simal no kodasing to mihecahecaan i, pakaaraay to 520 a ^mangan no ^tong a dadoy no simal, aca tora nahetecan tora heci no kodasing i, o sasangaen to sapakaen to fafoy aca to kalo'ayam, lomasato iraay komi sangaay to masamaamaanay a kasikasian, sanaw okodasing hananay itini i 'orip no tamdamdaw i caay ko mamalasawad, nanoto'as tangasa imatini, ano i 'orip to nomita o Pangcah/'Amis, aca i polong no Taywan, ngalefen tono Kaholaman a tamdaw, tada maolahay to kodasing. Polong tosasowaleng to kodasing. 1,Adihayay ko kasasilomaloma no kodasing, macakat to kofana' no tamdaw ami sanga' to sapaloma, irakoya Yiayo 22, 551(粵油22,551),sanyo 3 ,enha 1 ,canto 2 ,congha 17(中花17) hananay, sanaw soligaen ko pipili' ami poloma. 2,Anomipaloma i mihapinang to matatodongay a lomi'ad ato omah topipalomaan, nawhani ano caay katatodong kopipaloma, caay kafangcal kolengaw, caay kafangcal koka ciheci nira. 3,Anomahelek ami paloma i, songiraen ami dipo kolengaw nira, nawhani kalamkam a malengaw ko semot/lengos ami kihatiya to kodasing, lomasato, adihay ko kalofawo ato 'ayam/topi ami kali'ang. 4,Patatongonen kopi poliyaw ato sapayio ami fongsa tiya caay ka kalingan ko lengaw nira. 5,Malaod koka cihecian nira, mafana' ami patatodong topi siwkakan ami fi'enot, ano matafesiw toko pisiwkakan i, ranikayay a malengaw koya heci nira i sera/sota', caay to kangaay a siwkaken. 6,Mahelek ami siwka i, mipawali ami 'icang, ma^deng toko 'icang nira tiya manga'ay a solimeteng ami pacakay. (Siwkolan Pangchah/'Amis Suman) "參考資料" "科學發展"2016年10月,526期,16 ~ 21頁
S.PHON: ==== o~u pinaŋan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. ==== o~u pinaŋan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, matija o~u kaɾitaŋ ko~u pi ʡaɾaw ami ŋəŋəŋ, o~u maɾəŋawaj i so~utaʡ matija o~u kaɾo~urəŋo~us ko~u piʡaɾaw, nikao~uɾira aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ħəʦi nira mikiħatija to~u ɾamit i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u səɾa/so~utaʡ, matija o~u kaɾitaŋ a sato~usato~usa sa amaɾaʦəʦaj, ira ko~u to~uɾo~uaj səpatij amaɾaʦəʦaj, ano~u faŋʦaɾ ko~ukaɾəŋawan niɾa a səra i, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~uka ʦiħəʦi nira, o~u ħəʦi nira i maŋaʡajaj a maɾo~u kakaŋənən, maŋaʡajaj a sasimaɾəŋ ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan, sanaw mao~uɾaħaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ami papaɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ a maɾəŋaw i, itiraaj i safaʔɬ~ɮəɬ~ɮ sanaj ato~u so~uʡmətaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a səɾa. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paso~uwaɾaj i, ano~uʡajaw to~u **** a miħəʦaan misaɾiŋato~u a mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tani i tajwan nano~u o~u po~utawja a tamɬ~ɮaw misaɾiŋato~u a patajni i into~u ato~u awmən , ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u i o~u sipanja a tamɬ~ɮawan ko~u patajniaj i fiɾipiŋ , tija mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i no~u ħo~uɾamma a nijaɾo~uʡ tija a taɾaʦo~uwaʦo~u:wa a maɾo~upisak, nikao~uɾira to~uno~u o~uʦo~u a nijaɾo~uʡ i, siʔənawaj sanaw ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ a maŋəŋaw ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i tira, to~uno~u amiɾika sato~uħaw i, itini i **** amiħəʦaan o~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i o~u nano~u sapakaʔən to~u fafo~uj ato~u ʡajam, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u jamanikaw ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kakaʔən i, ħaɾo~u tamɬ~ɮaw sato~u ami saɾiŋato~u a ko~umaʔən, sanaw saaɬ~ɮiħaj sato~u ami sakakaħaɬ~ɮ ami paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. to~uno~umita sato~u o~u tajwan aʦa o~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis i, ʦaaj kafo~ukiɾ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ ħananaj, nano~umamaŋ taŋasa i to~uʡas ko~u pipapaɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ŋaʡajaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, ŋaʡajaj a sapaʦamo~uɾ i ħəmaj to~u to~uɾo~u no~u kaən, i ʡo~urip no~u mita ʦaaj to~u pakaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ a ko~umaʔən, ɾo~umasato~u ano~u irako~u ɾafaŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ i, aʦa ano~u mipaɾafaŋ sato~u a taraʦo~uaʦo~ua i, maŋaʡajaj a saɾiʔpaħ a ko~umaʔən ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ŋaɾəfəŋ to~u ko~uno~uaniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i o~u sasaŋaən to~u simaɾ ato~u kasi ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan a kakaənəŋ. masamaanaj ko~u rəŋaw no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. mipaɾo~uma sato~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, janano~uħəʦi nira maħəɾək ami siwka pawaɾiən to~u ami ʡiʦaŋ, ɾiko~uɾ sato~u miʡo~usaw to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u sapaɾo~uma, tija mipo~uħʦi to~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u ami saʡo~usi to~u sapaɾo~uma i, miso~uŋiɾaʡ to~u o~umaħ to~upi paɾo~umaan, tija misato~usito~usiɾ to~upi paɾo~umaan, ħato~usato~usa ħaan ami ɾafo~uŋ i so~utaʡ ʦəʦaj ɾipaʡ to~usa a ħəʦi no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~uɾa a ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i mao~uɾaħaj to~u so~uʔmətaj a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ama ɾəŋaw, awaaj ko~u pipiɾiʡ to~upi paɾo~umaan, ano~u masamaanaj to~u a səɾa ato~u so~uta, ŋaʡajaj to~u ami paɾo~uma, o~u ɾəŋaw nira a takaɾaw i ʦaaj pakatafəsiw to~u to~uso~uɾ no~u wo~uo~uʡ, misaɾiŋato~u a maɾəŋaw masaɬ~ɮak nani so~utaʡ a ɾo~umaħaɬ~ɮ, taŋasa ikato~uʡasan nira i, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin mato~uʡasaj to~u, aɾatək to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u misaɾiŋato~u aʦi ħana aʦi ħəʦi, sanaw ʦəʦaj miħəʦa i maʔɬ~ɮən nato~usa ami siwka, sanaw aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~uma o~uɾaħaj a paɾo~umaaj to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~upipaɾo~umaan to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, itira i saka ʦəʦaj taŋasa i sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ato~u i saka ʔənəm taŋasa i siwa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, to~unia maħəɾək ami paɾo~uma i maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ** aɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ misaɾiŋato~u to~u aʦi ħana, maħəɾək to~u ko~uka ʦiħana nira i, maʦəkər to~u kaja ħana nira a pasajɾa i so~utaʡ, tija amisaɾiŋato~u taŋasa i **~** aɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ʦəpaʡ no~u səɾa i, faŋʦaɾ ko~uka ʦiħəʦi nira, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, misatapaŋ to~u to~utajaɾ ami satapaŋ mifiʔəno~ut to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. ano~u ʦaaj patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ami siwka i, ano~u maɾatar miɾiʡajaw ko~upi siwka i, ʦaaj kaʔɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u ʡikis ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ, ano~u mao~uso~uj taɾaɾiko~uɾ ko~upi siwka i, ʦaaj to~u kafaŋʦaɾ a fiʔəno~utən, ħatiɾaaj ko~u misako~uɬ~ɮasiŋaj. samanəŋ a misaaɬ~ɮiħaj a paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ saʡajaw ħawi ʦəʦaj miħəʦa naʦəʦaj amipaɾo~uma naʦəʦaj ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ano~u mo~uʔəp pawti ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i miʡo~usaw to~u ʦəʦaj po~uwti to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u sapaɾo~uma, ano~u ħako~uwa ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u o~umaħ i, ħatiɾaaj ko~u pipatato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u o~umaħ ko~upi ʡaɾawan to~u pipatato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami paɾo~uma to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u kaaɬ~ɮiħaj no~umi paɾo~umaan, ɾiko~ursato~u ira ko~u tasa miħəʦa nato~uɾo~u ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ɾo~umasa ʦəʦaj miħəʦa nato~usa ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, aʦa nato~uɾo~u ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, itiraaj ko~u saka aɬ~ɮiħaj no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, iraaj ko~uno~u kaʦiħəɾaŋan a ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, iraaj ko~uno~u kasiʔənawan a ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ɾo~umasato~u i iraaj ko~u kakako~utajko~utaj to~u panaj aʦa o~u ko~u*a ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan ama ʦaʦaɾiw ami paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ano~u itini i maʦaʦamo~uɾaj to~u tafo~uk a sataʡ a paɾo~uma i taɬ~ɮafo~uŋʦaɾaj, nawħani i ɾaʔəno~uaj no~u so~utaʡ ko~u ħəʦi no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ano~u misiwka sato~u i faŋʦaɾaj a fiʡəno~utən, mao~uɾaħaj ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ to~u ħatiɾaaj a səra ato~u so~utaʡ ano~u *aʡaj i itini i so~uʔmətaj a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ʦəpaʡ no~u səra o~u taɬ~ɮafaŋʦaɾaj ko~u ɾəŋaw ato~u kaʦiħəʦi no~u ko~usasiŋ, ɾo~umasato~u nawħani mao~uɾaħ ko~u kaɾo~ufawo~u ato~u to~upi/ʡajam ami kaɾiʡaŋ to~u rəŋaw no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, sanaw ɾaɾiɬ~ɮəŋ ami ɾiso~uʡ ami simaw tija ʦaaj ka kaɾiʡaŋ ko~u rəŋaw no~ura ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, itiɾaaj sanaw matini ko~u saka aɬ~ɮiħaj no~u pisiwka to~u ko~usasiŋ. o~u saka taɬ~ɮamaan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. o~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ ħananaj i, ʦaaj ka ʔəɬ~ɮəŋaj a kaɾo~u kakaʔənən aʦa, maŋaʡajaj a sasimaɾən to~u simaɾ no~u sapi taŋtaŋ to~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮatəŋ ato~u kaɾo~umama:an, o~u saɬ~ɮak no~u simaɾ nira taŋasa i **%-**% ko~uka aɬ~ɮiħaj, mikikaka to~u kaɾitaŋ **%-**%, itini i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kako~uko~uka to~u misaŋaʡan to~u simaɾ no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan i, pakaaraaj to~u *** a ʔmaŋan no~u ʔto~uŋ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uj no~u simaɾ, aʦa to~ura naħətəʦan to~ura ħəʦi no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, o~u sasaŋaən to~u sapakaən to~u fafo~uj aʦa to~u kaɾo~uʡajam, ɾo~umasato~u iraaj ko~umi saŋaaj to~u masamaamaanaj a kasikasian, sanaw o~uko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ ħananaj itini i ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw i ʦaaj ko~u mamaɾasawaɬ~ɮ, nano~uto~uʡas taŋasa imatini, ano~u i ʡo~urip to~u no~umita o~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis, aʦa i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan, ŋaɾəfən to~uno~u kaħo~uɾaman a tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħaj to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. po~uɾo~uŋ to~usaso~uwaɾəŋ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. *,aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, maʦakat to~u ko~ufanaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ami saŋaʡ to~u sapaɾo~uma, irako~uja jiajo~u **, ***(****,***),sanjo~u * ,ənħa * ,ʦanto~u * ,ʦo~uŋħa **(****) ħananaj, sanaw so~uɾi*aən ko~u pipiɾiʡ ami po~uɾo~uma. *,ano~umipaɾo~uma i miħapinaŋ to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ato~u o~umaħ to~upipaɾo~umaan, nawħani ano~u ʦaaj katato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~upipaɾo~uma, ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ ko~uɾəŋaw, ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ ko~uka ʦiħəʦi nira. *,ano~umaħəɾək ami paɾo~uma i, so~uŋiraən ami ɬ~ɮipo~u ko~uɾəŋaw nira, nawħani kaɾamkam a maɾəŋaw ko~u səmo~ut/ɾəŋo~us ami kiħatija to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ɾo~umasato~u, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kaɾo~ufawo~u ato~u ʡajam/to~upi ami kaɾiʡaŋ. *,patato~uŋo~unən ko~upi po~uɾijaw ato~u sapajio~u ami fo~uŋsa tija ʦaaj ka kaɾiŋan ko~u ɾəŋaw nira. *,maɾao~uɬ~ɮ ko~uka ʦiħəʦian nira, mafanaʡ ami patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~upi siwkakan ami fiʡəno~ut, ano~u matafəsiw to~uko~u pisiwkakan i, ranikajaj a maɾəŋaw ko~uja ħəʦi nira i səra/so~utaʡ, ʦaaj to~u kaŋaaj a siwkakən. *,maħəɾək ami siwka i, mipawaɾi ami ʡiʦaŋ, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~uko~u ʡiʦaŋ nira tija maŋaʡaj a so~uɾimətəŋ ami paʦakaj. (siwko~uɾan paŋʦħaħ/ʡamis so~u~uman) "****" "****"********,****,** ~ ***
S.FORM: ==== O pinangan no kodasing. ==== O pinangan no kodasing i, matiya o kalitang ko pi 'alaw ami ngengeng, o malengaway i sota' matiya o kalorengos ko pi'alaw, nikaolira adihay ko heci nira mikihatiya to lamit i laloma' no sela/sota', matiya o kalitang a satosatosa sa amalacecay, ira ko toloay sepatiy amalacecay, ano fangcal kokalengawan nila a sera i, adihayay koka ciheci nira, o heci nira i manga'ayay a malo kakangenen, manga'ayay a sasimaleng ato kalomaamaan, sanaw maolahay ko tamdaw ami papaloma to kodasing, o kaolahan no kodasing a malengaw i, itiraay i safa^ded sanay ato so'metay a finacadan a sela. O sowal no pasowalay i, ano'ayaw to 1530 a mihecaan misalingato a mapacomod tani i Taywan nano o Potawya a tamdaw misalingato a patayni i Into ato Awmen , dodo sato i o Sipanya a tamdawan ko patayniay i Filiping , tiya mapacomod tayni i no holamma a niyalo' tiya a talacowaco:wa a malopisak, nikaolira tono Oco a niyalo' i, si^enaway sanaw caay kafangcal a mangengaw ko kodasing i tira, tono Amilika satohaw i, itini i 1800 amihecaan o kodasing i o nano sapaka^en to fafoy ato 'ayam, dodo sato yamanikaw ko tamdaw to kaka^en i, halo tamdaw sato ami salingato a koma^en, sanaw saadihay sato ami sakakahad ami paloma to kodasing. Tonomita sato o Taywan aca o Pangcah/'Amis i, caay kafokil to kodasing hananay, nanomamang tangasa i to'as ko pipapaloma to kodasing, nga'ayay a kaladatengen, nga'ayay a sapacamol i hemay to tolo no kaen, i 'orip no mita caay to pakalasawad to kodasing a koma^en, lomasato ano irako lafang no loma' i, aca ano mipalafang sato a taracoacoa i, manga'ayay a sali^pah a koma^en ko kodasing, ngalefeng to konoaniniay a tamdaw, o kodasing i o sasangaen to simal ato kasi ato kalomaamaan a kakaeneng. Masamaanay ko rengaw no kodasing. Mipaloma sato kodasing i, yananoheci nira mahelek ami siwka pawalien to ami 'icang, likol sato mi'osaw to todongay to sapaloma, tiya mipohci to podac nira, ma^deng to ami sa'osi to sapaloma i, misongila' to omah topi palomaan, tiya misatositosil topi palomaan, hatosatosa haan ami lafong i sota' cecay lipa' tosa a heci no kodasing, ola a kodasing i maolahay to so^metay a lomi'ad ama lengaw, awaay ko pipili' topi palomaan, ano masamaanay to a sela ato sota, nga'ayay to ami paloma, o lengaw nira a takalaw i caay pakatafesiw to tosol no woo', misalingato a malengaw masadak nani sota' a lomahad, tangasa ikato'asan nira i, caay ka halafin mato'asay to, alatek tolo folad ma^deng to misalingato aci hana aci heci, sanaw cecay miheca i ma^den natosa ami siwka, sanaw adihay koma olahay a palomaay to kodasing, opipalomaan to kodasing i, itira i saka cecay tangasa i sakatolo a folad, ato i saka ^enem tangasa i siwa a folad, tonia mahelek ami paloma i malawod ko 40 alomi'ad misalingato to aci hana, mahelek to koka cihana nira i, maceker to kaya hana nira a pasayla i sota', tiya amisalingato tangasa i 45~60 alomi'ad, ano matatodong ko cepa' no sela i, fangcal koka ciheci nira, dodo sato malawod ko tosa a folad, misatapang to totayal ami satapang mifi^enot to kodasing. Ano caay patatodong to lomi'ad ami siwka i, ano malatar mili'ayaw kopi siwka i, caay ka^deng ko 'ikis caay kafangcal, ano maosoy talalikol kopi siwka i, caay to kafangcal a fi^enoten, hatilaay ko misakodasingay. Samaneng a misaadihay a paloma to kodasing Sa'ayaw hawi cecay miheca nacecay amipaloma nacecay ami kodasing, ano mo^ep pawti ko kodasing i mi'osaw to cecay powti to todongay o sapaloma, ano hakowa ko kakahad no omah i, hatilaay ko pipatatodong ami paloma to kodasing, o kakahad no omah kopi 'alawan to pipatatodong ami paloma to hakowaay ko kaadihay nomi palomaan, likorsato ira ko tasa miheca natolo ami kodasing, lomasa cecay miheca natosa ami kodasing, aca natolo ami kodasing, itiraay ko saka adihay no kodasing, iraay kono kacihelangan a kodasing, iraay kono kasi^enawan a kodasing, lomasato i iraay ko kakakotaykotay to panay aca o koga ato kalomaamaan ama cacaliw ami paloma to kodasing, ano itini i macacamolay to tafok a sata' a paloma i tadafongcalay, nawhani i la^enoay no sota' ko heci no kodasing, ano misiwka sato i fangcalay a fi'enoten, maolahay ko kodasing to hatilaay a sera ato sota' ano ga'ay i itini i so^metay a lomi'ad, matatodong ko cepa' no sera o tadafangcalay ko lengaw ato kaciheci no kosasing, lomasato nawhani maolah ko kalofawo ato topi/'ayam ami kali'ang to rengaw no kodasing, sanaw lalideng ami liso' ami simaw tiya caay ka kali'ang ko rengaw nora kodasing, itilaay sanaw matini ko saka adihay no pisiwka to kosasing. O saka tadamaan no kodasing. O kodasing hananay i, caay ka ^edengay a kalo kaka^enen aca, manga'ayay a sasimalen to simal no sapi tangtang to kalodateng ato kalomama:an, o sadak no simal nira tangasa i 45%-50% koka adihay, mikikaka to kalitang 14%-16%, itini i polong no kakokoka to misanga'an to simal no kodasing to mihecahecaan i, pakaaraay to 520 a ^mangan no ^tong a dadoy no simal, aca tora nahetecan tora heci no kodasing i, o sasangaen to sapakaen to fafoy aca to kalo'ayam, lomasato iraay komi sangaay to masamaamaanay a kasikasian, sanaw okodasing hananay itini i 'orip no tamdamdaw i caay ko mamalasawad, nanoto'as tangasa imatini, ano i 'orip to nomita o Pangcah/'Amis, aca i polong no Taywan, ngalefen tono Kaholaman a tamdaw, tada maolahay to kodasing. Polong tosasowaleng to kodasing. 1,Adihayay ko kasasilomaloma no kodasing, macakat to kofana' no tamdaw ami sanga' to sapaloma, irakoya Yiayo 22, 551(粵油22,551),sanyo 3 ,enha 1 ,canto 2 ,congha 17(中花17) hananay, sanaw soligaen ko pipili' ami poloma. 2,Anomipaloma i mihapinang to matatodongay a lomi'ad ato omah topipalomaan, nawhani ano caay katatodong kopipaloma, caay kafangcal kolengaw, caay kafangcal koka ciheci nira. 3,Anomahelek ami paloma i, songiraen ami dipo kolengaw nira, nawhani kalamkam a malengaw ko semot/lengos ami kihatiya to kodasing, lomasato, adihay ko kalofawo ato 'ayam/topi ami kali'ang. 4,Patatongonen kopi poliyaw ato sapayio ami fongsa tiya caay ka kalingan ko lengaw nira. 5,Malaod koka cihecian nira, mafana' ami patatodong topi siwkakan ami fi'enot, ano matafesiw toko pisiwkakan i, ranikayay a malengaw koya heci nira i sera/sota', caay to kangaay a siwkaken. 6,Mahelek ami siwka i, mipawali ami 'icang, ma^deng toko 'icang nira tiya manga'ay a solimeteng ami pacakay. (Siwkolan Pangchah/'Amis Suman) "參考資料" "科學發展"2016年10月,526期,16 ~ 21頁
S.PHON: ==== o~u pinaŋan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. ==== o~u pinaŋan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, matija o~u kaɾitaŋ ko~u pi ʡaɾaw ami ŋəŋəŋ, o~u maɾəŋawaj i so~utaʡ matija o~u kaɾo~urəŋo~us ko~u piʡaɾaw, nikao~uɾira aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ħəʦi nira mikiħatija to~u ɾamit i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u səɾa/so~utaʡ, matija o~u kaɾitaŋ a sato~usato~usa sa amaɾaʦəʦaj, ira ko~u to~uɾo~uaj səpatij amaɾaʦəʦaj, ano~u faŋʦaɾ ko~ukaɾəŋawan niɾa a səra i, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~uka ʦiħəʦi nira, o~u ħəʦi nira i maŋaʡajaj a maɾo~u kakaŋənən, maŋaʡajaj a sasimaɾəŋ ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan, sanaw mao~uɾaħaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ami papaɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ a maɾəŋaw i, itiraaj i safaʔɬ~ɮəɬ~ɮ sanaj ato~u so~uʡmətaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a səɾa. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paso~uwaɾaj i, ano~uʡajaw to~u **** a miħəʦaan misaɾiŋato~u a mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tani i tajwan nano~u o~u po~utawja a tamɬ~ɮaw misaɾiŋato~u a patajni i into~u ato~u awmən , ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u i o~u sipanja a tamɬ~ɮawan ko~u patajniaj i fiɾipiŋ , tija mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i no~u ħo~uɾamma a nijaɾo~uʡ tija a taɾaʦo~uwaʦo~u:wa a maɾo~upisak, nikao~uɾira to~uno~u o~uʦo~u a nijaɾo~uʡ i, siʔənawaj sanaw ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ a maŋəŋaw ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i tira, to~uno~u amiɾika sato~uħaw i, itini i **** amiħəʦaan o~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i o~u nano~u sapakaʔən to~u fafo~uj ato~u ʡajam, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u jamanikaw ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kakaʔən i, ħaɾo~u tamɬ~ɮaw sato~u ami saɾiŋato~u a ko~umaʔən, sanaw saaɬ~ɮiħaj sato~u ami sakakaħaɬ~ɮ ami paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. to~uno~umita sato~u o~u tajwan aʦa o~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis i, ʦaaj kafo~ukiɾ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ ħananaj, nano~umamaŋ taŋasa i to~uʡas ko~u pipapaɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ŋaʡajaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, ŋaʡajaj a sapaʦamo~uɾ i ħəmaj to~u to~uɾo~u no~u kaən, i ʡo~urip no~u mita ʦaaj to~u pakaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ a ko~umaʔən, ɾo~umasato~u ano~u irako~u ɾafaŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ i, aʦa ano~u mipaɾafaŋ sato~u a taraʦo~uaʦo~ua i, maŋaʡajaj a saɾiʔpaħ a ko~umaʔən ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ŋaɾəfəŋ to~u ko~uno~uaniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i o~u sasaŋaən to~u simaɾ ato~u kasi ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan a kakaənəŋ. masamaanaj ko~u rəŋaw no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. mipaɾo~uma sato~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, janano~uħəʦi nira maħəɾək ami siwka pawaɾiən to~u ami ʡiʦaŋ, ɾiko~uɾ sato~u miʡo~usaw to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u sapaɾo~uma, tija mipo~uħʦi to~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u ami saʡo~usi to~u sapaɾo~uma i, miso~uŋiɾaʡ to~u o~umaħ to~upi paɾo~umaan, tija misato~usito~usiɾ to~upi paɾo~umaan, ħato~usato~usa ħaan ami ɾafo~uŋ i so~utaʡ ʦəʦaj ɾipaʡ to~usa a ħəʦi no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~uɾa a ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i mao~uɾaħaj to~u so~uʔmətaj a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ama ɾəŋaw, awaaj ko~u pipiɾiʡ to~upi paɾo~umaan, ano~u masamaanaj to~u a səɾa ato~u so~uta, ŋaʡajaj to~u ami paɾo~uma, o~u ɾəŋaw nira a takaɾaw i ʦaaj pakatafəsiw to~u to~uso~uɾ no~u wo~uo~uʡ, misaɾiŋato~u a maɾəŋaw masaɬ~ɮak nani so~utaʡ a ɾo~umaħaɬ~ɮ, taŋasa ikato~uʡasan nira i, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin mato~uʡasaj to~u, aɾatək to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u misaɾiŋato~u aʦi ħana aʦi ħəʦi, sanaw ʦəʦaj miħəʦa i maʔɬ~ɮən nato~usa ami siwka, sanaw aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~uma o~uɾaħaj a paɾo~umaaj to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~upipaɾo~umaan to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, itira i saka ʦəʦaj taŋasa i sakato~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ato~u i saka ʔənəm taŋasa i siwa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, to~unia maħəɾək ami paɾo~uma i maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ** aɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ misaɾiŋato~u to~u aʦi ħana, maħəɾək to~u ko~uka ʦiħana nira i, maʦəkər to~u kaja ħana nira a pasajɾa i so~utaʡ, tija amisaɾiŋato~u taŋasa i **~** aɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ʦəpaʡ no~u səɾa i, faŋʦaɾ ko~uka ʦiħəʦi nira, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~u sato~u maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u to~usa a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, misatapaŋ to~u to~utajaɾ ami satapaŋ mifiʔəno~ut to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. ano~u ʦaaj patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ami siwka i, ano~u maɾatar miɾiʡajaw ko~upi siwka i, ʦaaj kaʔɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u ʡikis ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ, ano~u mao~uso~uj taɾaɾiko~uɾ ko~upi siwka i, ʦaaj to~u kafaŋʦaɾ a fiʔəno~utən, ħatiɾaaj ko~u misako~uɬ~ɮasiŋaj. samanəŋ a misaaɬ~ɮiħaj a paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ saʡajaw ħawi ʦəʦaj miħəʦa naʦəʦaj amipaɾo~uma naʦəʦaj ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ano~u mo~uʔəp pawti ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i miʡo~usaw to~u ʦəʦaj po~uwti to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u sapaɾo~uma, ano~u ħako~uwa ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u o~umaħ i, ħatiɾaaj ko~u pipatato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u o~umaħ ko~upi ʡaɾawan to~u pipatato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami paɾo~uma to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u kaaɬ~ɮiħaj no~umi paɾo~umaan, ɾiko~ursato~u ira ko~u tasa miħəʦa nato~uɾo~u ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ɾo~umasa ʦəʦaj miħəʦa nato~usa ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, aʦa nato~uɾo~u ami ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, itiraaj ko~u saka aɬ~ɮiħaj no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, iraaj ko~uno~u kaʦiħəɾaŋan a ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, iraaj ko~uno~u kasiʔənawan a ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ɾo~umasato~u i iraaj ko~u kakako~utajko~utaj to~u panaj aʦa o~u ko~u*a ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan ama ʦaʦaɾiw ami paɾo~uma to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ano~u itini i maʦaʦamo~uɾaj to~u tafo~uk a sataʡ a paɾo~uma i taɬ~ɮafo~uŋʦaɾaj, nawħani i ɾaʔəno~uaj no~u so~utaʡ ko~u ħəʦi no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ano~u misiwka sato~u i faŋʦaɾaj a fiʡəno~utən, mao~uɾaħaj ko~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ to~u ħatiɾaaj a səra ato~u so~utaʡ ano~u *aʡaj i itini i so~uʔmətaj a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ʦəpaʡ no~u səra o~u taɬ~ɮafaŋʦaɾaj ko~u ɾəŋaw ato~u kaʦiħəʦi no~u ko~usasiŋ, ɾo~umasato~u nawħani mao~uɾaħ ko~u kaɾo~ufawo~u ato~u to~upi/ʡajam ami kaɾiʡaŋ to~u rəŋaw no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, sanaw ɾaɾiɬ~ɮəŋ ami ɾiso~uʡ ami simaw tija ʦaaj ka kaɾiʡaŋ ko~u rəŋaw no~ura ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, itiɾaaj sanaw matini ko~u saka aɬ~ɮiħaj no~u pisiwka to~u ko~usasiŋ. o~u saka taɬ~ɮamaan no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. o~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ ħananaj i, ʦaaj ka ʔəɬ~ɮəŋaj a kaɾo~u kakaʔənən aʦa, maŋaʡajaj a sasimaɾən to~u simaɾ no~u sapi taŋtaŋ to~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮatəŋ ato~u kaɾo~umama:an, o~u saɬ~ɮak no~u simaɾ nira taŋasa i **%-**% ko~uka aɬ~ɮiħaj, mikikaka to~u kaɾitaŋ **%-**%, itini i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kako~uko~uka to~u misaŋaʡan to~u simaɾ no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan i, pakaaraaj to~u *** a ʔmaŋan no~u ʔto~uŋ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uj no~u simaɾ, aʦa to~ura naħətəʦan to~ura ħəʦi no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ i, o~u sasaŋaən to~u sapakaən to~u fafo~uj aʦa to~u kaɾo~uʡajam, ɾo~umasato~u iraaj ko~umi saŋaaj to~u masamaamaanaj a kasikasian, sanaw o~uko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ ħananaj itini i ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw i ʦaaj ko~u mamaɾasawaɬ~ɮ, nano~uto~uʡas taŋasa imatini, ano~u i ʡo~urip to~u no~umita o~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis, aʦa i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan, ŋaɾəfən to~uno~u kaħo~uɾaman a tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħaj to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. po~uɾo~uŋ to~usaso~uwaɾəŋ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ. *,aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, maʦakat to~u ko~ufanaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ami saŋaʡ to~u sapaɾo~uma, irako~uja jiajo~u **, ***(****,***),sanjo~u * ,ənħa * ,ʦanto~u * ,ʦo~uŋħa **(****) ħananaj, sanaw so~uɾi*aən ko~u pipiɾiʡ ami po~uɾo~uma. *,ano~umipaɾo~uma i miħapinaŋ to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ɾo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ato~u o~umaħ to~upipaɾo~umaan, nawħani ano~u ʦaaj katato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~upipaɾo~uma, ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ ko~uɾəŋaw, ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ ko~uka ʦiħəʦi nira. *,ano~umaħəɾək ami paɾo~uma i, so~uŋiraən ami ɬ~ɮipo~u ko~uɾəŋaw nira, nawħani kaɾamkam a maɾəŋaw ko~u səmo~ut/ɾəŋo~us ami kiħatija to~u ko~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, ɾo~umasato~u, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kaɾo~ufawo~u ato~u ʡajam/to~upi ami kaɾiʡaŋ. *,patato~uŋo~unən ko~upi po~uɾijaw ato~u sapajio~u ami fo~uŋsa tija ʦaaj ka kaɾiŋan ko~u ɾəŋaw nira. *,maɾao~uɬ~ɮ ko~uka ʦiħəʦian nira, mafanaʡ ami patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~upi siwkakan ami fiʡəno~ut, ano~u matafəsiw to~uko~u pisiwkakan i, ranikajaj a maɾəŋaw ko~uja ħəʦi nira i səra/so~utaʡ, ʦaaj to~u kaŋaaj a siwkakən. *,maħəɾək ami siwka i, mipawaɾi ami ʡiʦaŋ, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~uko~u ʡiʦaŋ nira tija maŋaʡaj a so~uɾimətəŋ ami paʦakaj. (siwko~uɾan paŋʦħaħ/ʡamis so~u~uman) "****" "****"********,****,** ~ ***
